faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Morrisania buildings?
faqs.answer: Morrisania properties commonly experience pavement ants, odorous house ants, and carpenter ants. Older buildings in the area are particularly susceptible to carpenter ants, which can cause structural damage if left untreated. We identify the species and customize treatment accordingly.
